calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-06-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Sanctions IS GRANTED, No opposition was filed. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $640.00. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)

Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)
